title: Validated strategy for sim
description: Task-specific validated strategy from successful run of sim.
instructions:
## When to use
- Task closely matches `sim` or its assets.

## Key strategy
- **Forward Model:**
- $$\mathbf{f} = \mathbf{A}\mathbf{x} + \mathbf{b} + \mathbf{n}$$
- - $\mathbf{f} \in \mathbb{R}^{128 \times 128}$: observed fluorescence microscopy image
- - $\mathbf{A}$: convolution operator with the Point Spread Function (PSF), i.e., $\mathbf{A}\mathbf{x} = \text{PSF} * \mathbf{x}$
- - $\mathbf{x} \in \mathbb{R}^{128 \times 128}$: latent super-resolved image (unknown)

## Validated metrics
- {'psnr': 23.020121, 'ssim': 0.0}

## Constraints
- Adapt constants and file paths to the current task.
- Prefer the validated plan unless Judge feedback proves regression.

title: General pattern: admm
instructions:
## When to use
- Plan relies on `admm` or a closely related method.

## Guidance
- **Forward Model:**
- $$\mathbf{f} = \mathbf{A}\mathbf{x} + \mathbf{b} + \mathbf{n}$$
- - $\mathbf{f} \in \mathbb{R}^{128 \times 128}$: observed fluorescence microscopy image
- - $\mathbf{A}$: convolution operator with the Point Spread Function (PSF), i.e., $\mathbf{A}\mathbf{x} = \text{PSF} * \mathbf{x}$

## Constraints
- Only apply when the forward model and data assumptions match.
- Keep as draft until multiple successful trajectories corroborate.
